name: SUPER Dungeon Muncher
short_description: Avoid becoming Muncher's next meal in this fast-paced adventure! Control your anger, this game is hard!
detailed_description:
• START

    — Welcome to Super Dungeon Muncher! Dive into a tough adventure that tests your reflexes and quick thinking!

  • KEEP MOVING

    — Muncher is very hungry, and you're on the menu! Stay ahead and avoid becoming its next meal!

  • GEAR UP

    — Equip yourself with arsenal of tools to navigate obstacles, open up new paths, and take down baddies!

  • DISCOVER

    — Persist through to unveil new lands and secrets on your journey!

  • UNLOCKABLE CHARACTERS

    — Complete quests and master challenges to unlock 20 unique characters, each with their own abilities and playstyles!

  • PLAY YOUR WAY

    — Support for keyboard, gamepad and touch-screen controls!

SUPER Dungeon Muncher is a challenging runner that combines rogue-like elements and puzzle solving - The titular Muncher chases you in real-time, while your movements are turn-based and restricted to a grid! Can you outrun the hungry menace?
